options.label: Quoted CSV parsing
options.description: Fix rows with embedded commas or quotes

text: Other: stop swallowing 429 responses from the upstream API.

[Requirements]
Goal:           Tighten the import cron job in the narrowest safe way.
Inputs:         Existing cron worker and its nearby tests.
Constraints:    Keep the change small and scoped to the current import flow.
Assumptions:    Focus on surfacing and retrying 429 responses instead of broad scheduler changes.
Open questions: None.

Done. Changed 2 file(s):
- src/jobs/import-cron.ts: stop swallowing 429 responses and emit a retryable failure
- src/jobs/import-cron.test.ts: add regression coverage for upstream 429 handling
